name: Son Gohan & Son Goten, Sons of a Magnificent Father
skill:
[Deflect][Dual Attack]
[Activate Main][Limit 1], if your Leader is {Vegeta, Awakened Feelings} and you have 3 or more energy: Draw 1 card and play this card from your hand.
[Activate Main] Place 1 red 《Saiyan》 card from your Z-Energy under {Concentrated Saiyan Power} in your Battle Area: Choose up to 1 of your opponent's Battle Cards and it gets -15000 power for the turn.

name: SS Broly, Fighting Spirit Erupting
skill:
[EX-Evolve][Limit 1] Blue ＜Broly : Br＞ card with an energy cost of 5.
[Auto][Limit 1] Discard 1 card from your hand and choose 1 of your blue ＜Broly : Br＞ cards with an energy cost of 6 or less: When your or your opponent's Battle Card is played, switch the chosen card to Active Mode and place up to 2 blue ＜Broly : Br＞ cards from your Drop under the chosen card.
[Activate Main] Discard this card from your hand: Add up to 1 blue ＜Broly : Br＞ card with an energy cost of 3 from your Drop to your hand.

name: Mai, Survivor
skill:
[Auto][Limit 1] If your Leader is a green ＜Mai : Future＞ card: When this card is played, draw 1 card, choose up to 1 {SS2 Trunks, Path to the Future} in your Battle Area and switch it to Active Mode.
[Auto] At the end of your turn, choose all of your green ＜Mai : Future＞ cards with energy costs of 1, switch them to Active Mode, choose up to 1 of your green ＜Mai : Future＞ cards and it gains [Barrier] until the end of your opponent's turn.

name: SS Son Goku, Magnificent Father
skill:
[Auto] When this card in your Z-Deck is added to your Z-Energy, choose up to 1 of your yellow 《Saiyan》 cards and it gets +5000 power for the turn.
[Activate Main][Limit 1], if your opponent has 2 or more energy: Play this card from your hand.
[Activate Main] If your Leader's back side is a yellow ＜Son Gohan : Childhood＞ card and you place this card into your Z-Deck face-up: Play up to 1 yellow ＜Son Goku＞ card with an energy cost of 4 and a [Swap] skill from your deck, then shuffle your deck.

name: Fused Zamasu, Coalescing Despair
skill:
[Empower Black 2]
[Activate: Main/Battle][Limit 1][Spirit Boost 1] If your Leader is black and you place 2 black cards from your Warp into their owner's Drop: Play this card from its owner's Warp with 0 markers on it.
[Activate Battle] Send 2 black cards from your Drop to their owner's Warp: Choose up to 1 of your cards and it gets +5000 power for the battle.
[UNISON +1][Activate Main] Draw 1 card and discard 1 card from your hand.

name: Fused Zamasu, Coalescing Despair
skill:
[Empower Black 2]
[Activate: Main/Battle][Limit 1][Spirit Boost 1] If your Leader is black and you place 2 black cards from your Warp into their owner's Drop: Play this card from its owner's Warp with 0 markers on it.
[Activate Battle] Send 2 black cards from your Drop to their owner's Warp: Choose up to 1 of your cards and it gets +5000 power for the battle.
[UNISON +1][Activate Main] Draw 1 card and discard 1 card from your hand.

name: SS Vegeta, For the Sake of Family
skill:
[Blocker]
[Auto][Limit 1][one], if your Leader is white and your opponent has 2 or more energy: At the end of a battle in which this card was used in a combo from your hand, draw 1 card and play this card from your Drop.
[Auto] Switch this card to Hidden Mode: When this card is played, switch up to 1 of your energy to Revealed Mode or Hidden Mode.
[Activate Battle][Limit 1] Choose 1 Hidden Mode card in your Battle Area, switch it to Revealed Mode, and use it in a combo with its skills negated for the turn: Use this card from your hand in a combo.

name: SS Vegeta, For the Sake of Family
skill:
[Blocker]
[Auto][Limit 1][one], if your Leader is white and your opponent has 2 or more energy: At the end of a battle in which this card was used in a combo from your hand, draw 1 card and play this card from your Drop.
[Auto] Switch this card to Hidden Mode: When this card is played, switch up to 1 of your energy to Revealed Mode or Hidden Mode.
[Activate Battle][Limit 1] Choose 1 Hidden Mode card in your Battle Area, switch it to Revealed Mode, and use it in a combo with its skills negated for the turn: Use this card from your hand in a combo.
